notes: Two independent community aggregations that concord (baby shiny ~1/4.4 vs ~1/3; shiny V+VMAX combined 1/11.1 vs 1/12; amazing 1/17.4 vs 1/16). Shiny Vault slot replaces the reverse: baby shiny 1/4.4 + shiny V 1/19.8 + shiny VMAX 1/25.5 merged into the single shiny-vault id (engine spreads uniformly over the 122 SV cards — understates shiny VMAX scarcity slightly), residual filler 50/50 common/uncommon. Rare slot: holo 1/5.6, amazing 1/17.4, V 1/9.2, VMAX 1/18.4, ultra 1/30.8, rainbow 1/84, secret 1/109.9, residual on plain rare (the main set has 8 non-holo rares). No booster display (special set); ETB holds 10 packs.
